subject: Mathematics
title: Katherine Johnson: Hidden Figure of NASA
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Katherine Johnson: Hidden Figure of NASA.

hook.text: John Glenn refused to fly until Katherine Johnson personally verified the computer's orbital calculations.

buildup.text: At NASA, she calculated trajectories by hand for America's first crewed spaceflights.

discovery.text: Her math put Alan Shepard in space, John Glenn in orbit, and helped Apollo 11 reach the moon.

twist.text: As a Black woman in 1960s Virginia, she had to use separate bathrooms and dining rooms at work.

climax.text: In 2015, President Obama awarded her the Presidential Medal of Freedom. She was 97.

punchline.text: An astronaut trusted her math over the computer's.

quiz.question: Why did John Glenn request Katherine Johnson specifically?
options: He trusted her calculations over the computer's
